title: EvidenceRecord
description: Evidence backing an ExtractedClaim, owned by claim-evidence-service. Citation span minimized (short excerpt only, full content addressed by hash) — freshness re-check timestamp required.
$comment: compat_class: closed, signed: false (non-signed closed contract, ADR-0024(b) family). Authority: docs/architecture/contract-catalog.md P1 table row 'EvidenceRecord | claim-evidence | evidence_id; freshness 필수; 인용 span 최소화' (idempotency key evidence_id; freshness required; citation span minimized); docs/architecture/wave4-plan.md domain-contract candidate list. excerpt maxLength enforces 'span 최소화' (minimize quoted span) — the fuller evidence artifact is addressed via content_hash (sole ledger anchor, mirrors repo-intaken.content_hash pattern), never inlined raw. claim_id is a plain opaque string reference to domain/extracted-claim.claim_id (not a cross-file $ref — see extracted-claim.schema.json $comment on the common-only $ref convention).

project_id.$comment: Project-scoped, same scope as the ExtractedClaim it supports.

evidence_id.$comment: contract-catalog.md:39 idempotency key 'evidence_id'. Opaque, mirrors common/identifiers/v1 opaque-id shape.

claim_id.$comment: Opaque reference to domain/extracted-claim.claim_id (plain string value, not a cross-file $ref).

source_uri.$comment: Object reference to the evidence source — query/fragment forbidden (ADR-0024(f) presigned-token smuggling defense).

excerpt.$comment: contract-catalog.md:39 '인용 span 최소화' (minimize citation span) — short excerpt only, bounded to a tweet-length span; the fuller artifact is addressed via content_hash, never inlined raw.

freshness_checked_at.$comment: contract-catalog.md:39 'freshness 필수' — last freshness re-check timestamp, required on every instance.

content_hash.$comment: Content-addressed hash of the fuller evidence artifact (sole ledger anchor, mirrors repo-intaken.content_hash / SourceSnapshot.content_hash).
